MikMarbleMod 3.17 — install
===========================

This bundle is a complete, ready-to-run UE4SS install with MikMarbleMod.

1. Find your game's Win64 folder:
   <Steam>\steamapps\common\Marbles on Stream\MarblesOnStream\Binaries\Win64\

2. Copy the CONTENTS of this zip into that Win64 folder:
     dwmapi.dll   -> lands next to MarblesOnStream-Win64-Shipping.exe
     ue4ss\       -> merges into the existing ue4ss\ folder (if you already have one)

3. Launch the game. UE4SS loads the mod from
     ue4ss\Mods\MikMarbleMod\dlls\main.dll

What it does
------------
At the end of each race / royale it POSTs the final standings as JSON:

  POST {path}/results
  {"type":"race"|"royale","players":[{"name":"Alice","finished":true}, ...]}

Players are ordered finishers-first, then DNFs, so the LAST entry is the loser.

Endpoint
--------
On first launch the mod auto-creates:
     ue4ss\Mods\MikMarbleMod\config.txt

with these defaults (which match the bundled dummy server, server/server.py):

  host=127.0.0.1
  port=5000
  path=/mod        # POSTs to /mod/ready and /mod/results

To use your own backend, edit that file after the first launch and restart.
